key_items: SpaceX IPO filing reveals $1.45B Bitcoin position with 18,712 BTC, ranking 7th among public companies
Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite $2B spot ETF outflows, showing strong institutional support from long-term holders
Trump administration pushes Fed to grant crypto firms access to US payment rails, signaling major regulatory tailwind
reasoning: The confluence of major institutional Bitcoin accumulation (SpaceX's massive holdings ahead of IPO), strong price resilience despite ETF outflows indicating genuine demand, and pro-crypto regulatory momentum under Trump create a constructive 1-7 day setup. Micro-cap regulatory wins (Minnesota banking law, South Carolina pro-crypto legislation) and infrastructure expansion (Coinbase stablecoin, payment rail access) reinforce institutional adoption momentum despite some macro headwinds.
risks: Fed rate hike probability rising to 54% for December 2026 combined with BigTech earnings concerns could trigger renewed macro risk-off selling and reverse the current momentum.
